input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.11.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.11.3.3
            TITLE: missed slalom

            CONTENT:
            rule D.11.3.3: Missed Slalom
D.11.3.3 Missed Slalom 
Missing one or more gates of a given slalom will be counted as one Off Course

final_answer: Missing one or more gates of a given slalom will be counted as one Off Course
